dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, things are worse than before. Your efforts to {quest_action} helped, but {quest_threat_animate_the} struck again and undid much of our progress.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} reports that {quest_focus_the} {quest_focus_is} under renewed pressure. The {enemy_type_plural} are taking advantage of the chaos {location_hint}. We need to deal with them before they overrun what is left of {quest_stakes_the}.
dialogueChunks.outro: We are fighting on two fronts: nature and creatures. We need you now more than ever.

dialogueChunks.intro: More trouble, {player_name}. Since you started to {quest_action}, we discovered that {quest_threat_the} caused more damage than we realized.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_is} compromised and {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} at risk of total loss. {quest_ally} found that {enemy_type_plural} have nested in the wreckage {location_hint}. We need to clear them out before we can salvage anything.
dialogueChunks.outro: If we lose {quest_stakes_the}, there is nothing left to rebuild.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, an aftershock of {quest_threat_the} hit while you were working to {quest_action}. {quest_ally} was nearly caught in it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The area around {quest_focus_the} is now crawling with displaced {enemy_type_plural} {location_hint}. People cannot get close enough to continue repairs. Someone needs to secure the perimeter and drive them out.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} hanging by a thread. We need the area safe before we can save anything.

dialogueChunks.intro: The ground has not finished shifting, {player_name}. Another collapse near {quest_focus_the} opened a new passage and more {enemy_type_plural} came flooding out.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} counted twice as many creatures as before. They are spreading across the area {location_hint}, and our makeshift defenses will not hold. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} exposed on three sides.
dialogueChunks.outro: Thin their numbers before they realize how vulnerable we are. Every one you kill is one less threat to the survivors.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the {enemy_type_plural} you drove off have circled back. They found a different approach through the wreckage {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: This time they are bolder. {quest_ally} says they have been feeding on debris and they are larger, more aggressive. They attacked a patrol near {quest_focus_the} and injured two people. {quest_stakes_human_The} {quest_stakes_human_is} demanding we do something before the next attack.
dialogueChunks.outro: Track them through the wreckage and finish what you started. We cannot rebuild while predators circle our walls.

dialogueChunks.intro: We almost had it under control, {player_name}. Then a supply cache collapsed and the noise drew every {enemy_type} in the region.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: They swarmed the eastern approach to {quest_focus_the} and are denning in what used to be our storehouse {location_hint}. {quest_ally} says we cannot access any of our reserves until the area is cleared. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} running out of supplies.
dialogueChunks.outro: Reclaim the storehouse. Kill anything that has made a home in our ruins.
